channel.title: Automation on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist

item.title: System Status Snapshot Cpu Ram Disk Ports
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: One-command system status snapshot: load/CPU, RAM, disk usage, listening ports, and top processes—run in a minimal Docker lab for repeatable results.

item.title: AI-Driven Sway Configs: Code Llama Solved My Wayland Headaches
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: I detail my struggle with complex Wayland/Sway config files and how I used Code Llama and Ollama to automate, debug, and generate my perfect Linux desktop setup. A must-read for DevOps and advanced Linux users.
